events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing/kickers for anticipated pour pressure",
    "Potential for catastrophic formwork blowout during concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop all concrete placement activities in the affected area",
    "Evacuate personnel from the pour zone and adjacent areas",
    "Engage a qualified formwork designer/engineer to assess and redesign bracing per ACI 347",
    "Install additional bracing, kickers, and ties as required by the revised design before resuming work",
    "Re-inspect formwork system and obtain sign-off from a competent person prior to any further concrete placement"
  ],
  "rationale": "Inadequate bracing for lateral concrete pressure creates an imminent risk of formwork collapse, which can result in multiple fatalities, serious injuries, and property damage. ACI 347 requires formwork to be designed, fabricated, erected, supported, and braced so that it will safely support all vertical and lateral loads that may be applied. The observed condition is non-compliant and represents a critical safety hazard requiring immediate work stoppage and corrective action.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347-14 Guide to Formwork for Concrete, Chapter 2: Design",
    "ACI 347-14 Section 2.2.1: Vertical and lateral loads",
    "ACI 347-14 Section 2.3: Unit stresses and deflections",
    "OSHA 29 CFR 1926.703(a)(1): Formwork shall be designed, fabricated, erected, supported, braced and maintained so that it will be capable of supporting without failure all vertical and lateral loads that may reasonably be anticipated to be applied"
  ]
}
